title: Talk about work-life balance
subtitle: Discuss time, stress, and priorities.
overview: B1 work topics need balance and nuance.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: to balance work and personal life

items.es: Conciliar trabajo y vida personal no siempre es fácil.
items.en: Balancing work and personal life is not always easy.

items.es: A veces tenemos que poner límites claros.
items.en: Sometimes we have to set clear limits.
I try to disconnect after work.

items.es: Dormir bien ayuda a evitar el estrés.
Para mí, el tiempo libre no es un lujo, sino una necesidad.
items.en: For me, free time is not a luxury, but a necessity.
